style_effects: Intense molten lava cracks radiate from Alakazam's body, emitting vibrant orange and crimson embers that drift upward in slow, swirling patterns. A blazing crimson aura pulses around its form, casting warm amber light that distorts the air with heat shimmer, while smoke trails curl dynamically from its movements. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
